donate_interface-amount-error: A zât mümal tak ziak hräm rawh
donate_interface-bigamount-error: Thawhlawm USD $4 ($1 $2) aia tam kan rangpuihmunram aṭang hian kan dawng thei lo tlat. Thawhlawm thawhna hmunpui $3 hi khawngaihin bepawp rawh.
donate_interface-processing-error:
I dilna buaipuiah thil tih sual a awm tlat.
Buaipuitu pakhat mah an awm lo.
donate_interface-error-msg-validation: I kárawl dahkhah dik lohte siam ṭha rawh le.
